conservative.name: Wildsight
conservative.requirements:
3 Power
Animal within close range. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

chaosStar.description: As your visions coalesce, you glimpse unfathomable Chaos! After this spell recharges, you gain the Blinded condition for 2 rounds

challenge.description: Effect: While this card is recharging, you share vision with a friendly, small animal without flight. You can see what the animal sees. You can target an animal that cat fly if you add to your dice pool

reckless.name: Wildsight
reckless.requirements:
3 Power
Animal within close range. I you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

chaosStar.description: After this spell recharges, you suffer a temporary insanity with the Chaos trait. Then the animal, terrified, attacks the nearest living creature!

challenge.description: Effect: While this card is recharging, you share a vision with a friendly, small animal. You can see what the animal sees. You can target a larger or unfriendly animal if you add to your dice pool
